# Thin-client forbidden marker list
# One pattern per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
# CI scans every diff to develop for these strings. Any match blocks the merge.
# Add new markers here as new voice IDs, persona markers, or model configs are minted.
#
# WHY THIS FILE EXISTS:
# Clara Code (CLI, desktop IDE, website) is a thin HTTP client.
# All intelligence — personas, prompts, model routing, voice IDs, culture packs —
# lives server-side at api.claracode.ai / api.claraagents.com.
# Shipping intelligence in the client would expose the moat.
# See CONTRIBUTING.md §Thin-client discipline.

# ── Persona / heritage markers ──────────────────────────────────────────────
Villarosa
villarosa
AAVE
culture.pack
culture_pack
slang.rule
slang_rule
VSL_slang
vsl_slang

# ── System prompts / prompt templates ───────────────────────────────────────
system_prompt
systemPrompt
You are Clara
You are an AI assistant
SOUL.md
soul_config
persona_config
personaConfig

# ── Model IDs / provider routing ────────────────────────────────────────────
claude-3
claude-opus
claude-sonnet
claude-haiku
gpt-4
gpt-3.5
deepseek-
qwen-
llama-3
maverick-
openrouter.ai/api
api.openai.com
api.anthropic.com

# ── Voice IDs / TTS catalog ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
voice_id
voiceId
elevenlabs.io
cartesia.ai
play.ht
rime.ai

# ── Brain Proxy / agent internals ────────────────────────────────────────────
brain_proxy
brainProxy
brain.proxy
agent_soul
agentSoul
hermes-gateway

HERMES_GATEWAY_URL
modal.run

# ── Subscription-tier decisions (server-side only) ───────────────────────────
feature_gate
featureGate
tier.==
==.tier
plan.*free.*gate
plan.*pro.*gate
